security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data could be manipulated during transmission.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks data integrity checks during vote submission.

assumptions: The communication channel between the user and the contract is not secured.
The contract does not validate the integrity of received vote data.

mitigation.strategy: Implement data integrity checks (e.g., checksums, digital signatures) during vote transmission.

description: An attacker might alter the vote data during transmission to influence the outcome of the proposal.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not provide mechanisms for non-repudiation of votes.

assumptions: The voting system does not record sufficient metadata to link votes to specific users.
There is no mechanism to cryptographically prove the origin and authenticity of votes.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a secure audit log to record vote metadata and cryptographic signatures.

description: An attacker could cast votes and deny their participation later on.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote details may be exposed during transmission.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not sufficiently protect the confidentiality of vote data.

assumptions: The communication channel between the user and the governance contract is not encrypted.
The governance contract does not handle vote data in a confidential manner.

mitigation.strategy: Encrypt the communication channel and implement confidential handling of vote data within the governance contract.

description: An attacker could intercept vote data during transmission and reveal vote information.
